compliance.assurance_rationale: FedRAMP Rev.5 Baselines SI-4 System monitoring — privilege-escalation detection is called out explicitly as an SI-4(2) indicator of unauthorised use.
ASD Essential Eight E8.05 Restrict administrative privileges — privilege-escalation detection demonstrates the mitigation strategy is being continuously verified.
SAMA CSF v1.0 3.3.5 Security monitoring — privilege-escalation detection is a core Saudi Arabian FI monitoring control.
RBI Cyber Security Framework Annex-A Baseline cyber-security controls — host privilege-escalation detection is listed as a baseline control for scheduled commercial banks.
